creator: melissa-freebsd@littlebluecar.co.uk
text:
Console prints:
<snip cd stuff>
ata2-master: pio=PIO4 wdma=WDMA2 udma=UDMA133 cable=40 wire
ata3: CONNECT requested
ata3: CONNECTED
ata3: SATA connect ready time=0ms
ata3: sata_connect devices=0x1<ATA_MASTER>
ata3: CONNECT requested
ata3: CONNECT requested
ata3: CONNECT requested
ata3: CONNECT requested
ad4: 238471MB <HITACHI HDS7225SBSUN250G 0634NSTP3J V440A9CA> at ata2-master SATA 300
ad4: 488390625 sectors [484514C/16H/63S] 16 sectors/interrupt 1 depth queue
ata3: CONNECT requested

and then hangs

It appears to have identified it as an nForce MCP55 chip

Fix: 

System will boot and install using i386 CDs
How-To-Repeat: Boot from any 6.2B3 amd64 CD.
